test-case.name: CorruptSave_FallsBackToFreshProgress
test-case.output: Adventure progress save could not be read. Starting fresh. JSON parse error: Invalid value.

test-case.name: BackyardMission_Objectives_Hazards_Tug_Clear_AndRestart
